case_title: RAUL ESCORZA VS. SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCORZA, RAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 7/10/12 TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS CO.,L.P., "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESCORZA, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA CASTANEDA--SPANISH INTERPRETER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCORZA, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUL-09-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS TO BRING SPANISH INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 6/27/12 TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY LP, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-02-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAVE BOTH BEEN HANDED COPIES OF THE CLAIM IN COURT REGARDING THE FUTURE HEARING DATE, AS THERE IN NOT SUFFICIENT TIME FOR NOTICE OF MAILING TO REACH THE PARTIES. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 7/02/12 TO DEFENDANT SPRING COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY LP, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
